scans.secretScan: No private key, credential, password, access-key, or unredacted secret pattern in sidecar-bound artifacts.
scans.privatePathScan: No private absolute home path occurs in retained sidecar artifacts; raw trace remains external behind trajectory URI references.
scans.trainingDataLeakageScan: No hidden evaluation, future solution, unexecuted alternative, preference, or post-outcome state is included in an earlier state hash.

redactions.replacement: semantic runtime labels, <maven-repository>, evidence SHA-256, or trajectory:// reference

limitations: The immutable external trace contains machine-local paths and is not copied into training messages; controlled replay may dereference it.
The TRAIN assignment is deterministic metadata only; no hidden test content is claimed or embedded.
